claims.summary: Delivery receipts need explicit accepted, duplicate, rejected, policy-blocked, partially-applied, and unknown outcomes.
claims.disposition: Verify the current receipt state machine preserves every outcome and exact pending resolution.

claims.summary: A receipt cannot establish spectral causation.
claims.disposition: Verify every receipt keeps spectral_causation_established false and labels later telemetry as temporal association.

claims.summary: Mutual address should enrich exact lineage without becoming a prerequisite for technical transport.
claims.disposition: Verify addressed and technically unaddressed packets remain valid, distinct outcomes.

claims.summary: A dynamic impact score or felt-effect interpretation would change behavior if wired into the sensory path.
claims.disposition: Hold live impact weighting and any delivery-to-causation promotion behind exact Mike/operator approval.
